channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Broken glass on footpath., 30th March
item.description:
Significant amoutn of broken glass at ///sometime.extend.tolerates
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greyhound Gardens, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Foul smell in lane., 30th March
item.description:
Outside Byways / The Willows. Gravel Walk. Smell is quite potent.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gravel Walk, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various pot holes have been repaired but one remains the area is like a patchwork quilt and want completely resurfacing wate gathers round the patches and splashes everywhere Debri and tarmac bits remain in the gutter and pavement, 30th March
item.description:
Outside 41and 43 whittington road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Whittington Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The tree directly outside No 3 Vittoria Walk has lost heavy branches regularly and hit vehicles. We do not feel it safe to park outside the Ouse. Along with significant debris falling on to our front garden. Next door (no 5) currently has their tree being taken down. Tho has been an issue for a significant period of time ( 2 x years) and has been reported. It is a shame that this could not have been addressed whilst the councils tree surgeons are on Vittoria Walk, 30th March
item.description:
Right outside no 3 vittoria walk on grass verge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vittoria Walk, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 30th March
item.description:
CUSTOMER HAS CONTACTED US TO STATE NEIGHBOURS BACKGARDEN FENCE IS DAMAGED DUE TO TREE FALLING ON IT (FROM EAST SIDE LOCATION NEAR BROOK) near trees are loose and appear that they will also fall on other fences/properties within vicinity as well as blocking brook causing flooding. customer has spoken to local council who have told them to speak with highways (does not appear to be highway jurisdiction) informed customer of highway records to get official response for local council tree inspectors to investigate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The drain is blocked problem, 30th March
item.description:
Broad box needs resetting
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Circa 8 inch pothole on Down Hatherley Lane, near church, 30th March
item.description:
Just before the church on the left hand side of the road. There are multiple very large potholes on this road which all need repair and have been here for over a year.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Down Hatherley Lane, Down Hatherley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 30th March
item.description:
At the entrance to Shelley Avenue. I've reported this several times. The area on the other side has been patched, but this one on the right at the beginning of the avenue was left. Please just fix whatever you see, instead of leaving them and having to come back again and again. It's madness!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Shelley Road, St Mark's, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 manholes partially collapsed and with loose covers, 30th March
item.description:
5m NE of traffic island on Old Bath rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Old Bath Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes along the short length of Crescent Place makes it difficult to steer clear of them, 30th March
item.description:
Around a dozen potholes in small groups, needs a comprehensive resurfacing for the whole shirt length of Crescent Place
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Place, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole. Narrow road so cant avoid, 29th March
item.description:
Too many potholes along the length of parabola lane, cheltenham that runs along the back of Cheltenham courthouse . Access out of St georges road car park and the flat means you have to go along parabola lane. Potholes have been reported before but nothing has happened about them.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parabola Lane, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 29th March
item.description:
Old Gloucester road where u have repair some of the pot holes this is what's left u should of done when u done the other lot
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes on edge of road, 29th March
item.description:
Potholes on the edge of this section of road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badgeworth Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes still there, 29th March
item.description:
The potholes that have supposedly been fixed here are still there- the job needs doing properly. There are pot holes with paint around them that have not been fixed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Hesters Way, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree leaning dangerously, 29th March
item.description:
Located on Copt elm road at the junction with Church Walk. Opposite Brookway Drive. Tree is located on the pavement. Tree is leaning more and more each week. Crown of the tree has dropped 2-3 foot due to the lean and you can see cracking on the trunk. Concerned it is going to collapse.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Copt Elm Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light is permanently out problem, 29th March
item.description:
5 street lights not working since approx 23/03
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights out on Farm Lane, 29th March
item.description:
The street light on farm lane are out This is from the Kidnappers Lane to Brizen Lane 5 of them are out I tried to call it through but just haven’t been able to get through.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farm Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 29th March
item.description:
7 - 8 potholes, also rocking manhole
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary speed limit signs blocking new cycle path, 29th March
item.description:
There are a number of 30 mph signs that have been placed on the brand new cycle track blocking the track. How has this dangerous positioning of signs been allowed? These need to be removed urgently before they cause an accident!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Traffic signal head appears to be not working, 29th March
item.description:
The crossroads at the junction of St John’s Court and Gloucester Road in Cheltenham. Heading towards Cheltenham Railway Station.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10-30, Millbrook Street, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working
